{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220644491A8258466D1A5A0C54C3"}"},"total":800},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7555949520833413912","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得老逢魔这个小说写的很不错，有系统文，也富有奥特精神，对于一些社会问题也有些隐射，也能对于这些问题有好的善终，其中单元剧的形式也安排的不错，希望这本书能继续努力下去（不希望像直接基本书直接放弃了，希望读的人能送点免费的礼物给作者，让他有动力继续写下去，(ง •̀_•́)ง加油！）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759260886,"group_id":"7536856207949040702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2tL46peDb49WwbGGZOeq1j6XcnxkTuOyeTjAx6GqdMt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"1267090222492679","user_name":"好客的异乡人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1267090222492679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7536856207949040702","book_info":{"abstract":"顾江绝望了，明明是永恒核心＋地球意志的无敌开局，可偏偏穿越的时间不对点。
现在摆在他面前的，是已经快把整颗星球从他这个地球意志手里牛走的斯菲亚，甚至就连自己都快成为斯菲亚队员的妻子。
同时，宇宙中的黑暗巨人一族为了振兴整个种族正在朝地球赶来。
吉尔巴里斯为了宇宙的和平，以肃清所有生命体和有机文明为目标，朝地球飞来。
宇宙绅士美菲拉斯玩心大起，带着卡欧斯病毒抵达银河系，准备给地球上的人类来上一点小小的震撼。
为了吞噬一切、填满无尽的饥饿、魔格大蛇一族正从遥远的怪兽银河跃跳而来、
感知到来自地球星之声的鲁格赛特，为了肃清斯菲亚细胞这个异端，正顺着永恒核心爆发出的能量轨迹，迅速赶来！
面对这种极端劣势，顾江叹息一声，掏出创意工坊，解锁形态转变MOD！
【形态的转变v1.0：添加‘强力型’与‘空中型’，现在、您的奥特战士可以切换‘强力型’、‘空中型’了！】
而在往后，一个接着一个MOD正在解锁……。
更多的生物、更好地适应性、奥特格斗进化重生0·精神系统、守护兽、元素水晶。
随着所有mod下载完毕，顾江抬头，咧嘴一笑：
“诸宇宙怪兽、极恶宇宙人、黑暗奥特曼，闻吾球名无不丧胆！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1e1c4b31727a5278bc9a393d27dec367","author":"老逢魔","author_id":"","book_id":"7536856207949040702","book_name":"史上最大危机？但我是永恒核心！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7536957585744724504","read_count":"37228","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"892694"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"424","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,星际,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0412f7d19f9bd8af42197c0daa6068f2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317089&x-signature=ZOyACq6NByDHCSZvy3YzYDuUoig%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101399621933","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220644491A8258466D1A5A0C54C3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"l
